tiers.standardDesc: Enables balance sheets, standard SAK EP ledgers, and AR/AP aging dashboard.
tiers.advancedDesc: Performs trials, audits, PDF/CSV pack exports, and detailed ratio analysis (ROA, ROE, Current Ratio).

preferences.title: Interface Preferences
preferences.fontHint: Cmd/Ctrl + +/- to zoom, Cmd/Ctrl + 0 to reset

reset.title: Factory Reset
reset.description: Erase all cooperative data, member records, transactions, and preferences. The gamification engine and leveling system will not be affected. This action cannot be undone.
reset.confirm: Click again to confirm — this cannot be undone

ranking.title: Cooperative Ranking
ranking.offlineEmptyDesc: Leaderboards are only available when synced to the PAKDE cloud. Connect to the internet and sync to compete with other cooperatives.

empty.title: No events yet
empty.description: Create your first cooperative event — member meetings, training sessions, or community gatherings. Events appear on the calendar automatically.

rat.label: RAT — Annual Member Meeting
rat.name: Rapat Anggota Tahunan — Koperasi Desa
rat.agenda2: 2. Annual financial report and SHU distribution
rat.agenda3: 3. Work plan and budget for the upcoming year
rat.prep_d30: D-30: Form steering committee and assign roles
rat.prep_d21: D-21: Finalize SHU calculation with accounting data
rat.prep_d14: D-14: Print invitations and distribute to all members
rat.prep_d7: D-7: Confirm speakers, finalize meeting agenda
rat.prep_d3: D-3: Print financial reports and prepare venue layout
rat.prep_d1: D-1: Venue setup, catering confirmation, sound check
rat.rationale1: Mandatory by law (UU No. 25 Tahun 1992). Non-compliance risks cooperative legal status.
rat.rationale2: Annual SHU distribution is the single biggest member retention tool. Attendance = trust.
rat.rationale3: RAT is where strategic decisions are made — work plan, budget, board elections.
rat.check_d30: D-30: Form steering committee and assign roles
rat.check_d21: D-21: Finalize SHU calculation with accounting data
rat.check_d14: D-14: Print invitations and distribute to all members
rat.check_d7: D-7: Confirm speakers, finalize meeting agenda
rat.check_d3: D-3: Print financial reports and prepare venue layout
rat.check_d1: D-1: Venue setup, catering confirmation, sound check
rat.roi1: Legal compliance — avoids cooperative deregistration risk
rat.roi2: Member trust reinforcement — SHU transparency drives savings renewal and new loan applications

training.label: Member Training / Workshop
training.name: Pelatihan Anggota —
training.prep_d14: D-14: Coordinate with trainer and prepare curriculum
training.prep_d7: D-7: Print training materials and book venue
training.prep_d3: D-3: Confirm attendee list and send reminders
training.prep_d1: D-1: Prepare certificates, stationery, and equipment
training.rationale1: Skilled members = better cooperative operations. Training builds internal capacity without expensive consultants.
training.rationale2: SKKNI-aligned certification adds professional credibility to cooperative staff and active members.
training.check_d14: D-14: Coordinate with trainer and prepare curriculum
training.check_d7: D-7: Print training materials and book venue
training.check_d3: D-3: Confirm attendee list and send reminders
training.check_d1: D-1: Prepare certificates, stationery, and equipment
training.roi1: Internal capacity building — reduces dependency on external consultants
training.roi2: Certified members can train others (cascade effect)

gathering.label: Community Gathering
gathering.name: Silaturahmi & Halal Bihalal Anggota
gathering.agenda1: 1. Community meal, games, and door prizes
gathering.prep_d7: D-7: Book venue and caterer, announce to members
gathering.prep_d3: D-3: Purchase door prizes and decorations
gathering.prep_d1: D-1: Finalize guest list and prepare event rundown
gathering.rationale1: Informal gatherings build social bonds that formal meetings cannot. Members who feel connected are 3x more likely to renew savings.
gathering.check_d7: D-7: Book venue and caterer, announce to members
gathering.check_d3: D-3: Purchase door prizes and decorations
gathering.check_d1: D-1: Finalize guest list and prepare event rundown
gathering.roi2: Low-cost morale boost — happy members = active members

market.label: Market Day / Bazaar
market.name: Bazar & Pasar Rakyat Koperasi
market.agenda1: 1. Set up vendor stalls and cooperative product showcase
market.agenda2: 2. Live sales, member promotions, and new member registration booth
market.prep_d14: D-14: Register vendors and secure permits
market.prep_d7: D-7: Promote event, prepare stall layouts
market.prep_d3: D-3: Confirm vendors, print price tags and banners
market.prep_d1: D-1: Set up stalls, test POS equipment, final inventory check
market.rationale1: Market days turn the cooperative into a community destination. Vendors pay stall fees (revenue) and attract crowds (foot traffic).
market.rationale2: Cooperative product showcase builds member awareness of what the koperasi actually sells and does.
market.check_d14: D-14: Register vendors and secure permits
market.check_d7: D-7: Promote event, prepare stall layouts
market.check_d3: D-3: Confirm vendors, print price tags and banners
market.check_d1: D-1: Set up stalls, test POS equipment, final inventory check
market.roi1: Stall fee revenue + cooperative product sales on event day
market.roi2: New member registrations from public attendees
market.roi3: Vendor relationships built — potential future cooperative suppliers

financial.label: Financial Report Presentation
financial.name: Pemaparan Laporan Keuangan Tahunan
financial.agenda1: 1. Presentation of balance sheet and income statement
financial.agenda2: 2. Q&A session with members on financial health
financial.prep_d7: D-7: Compile financial data from accounting module
financial.prep_d3: D-3: Prepare slide deck and print summary reports
financial.prep_d1: D-1: Rehearse presentation, confirm AV equipment
financial.rationale1: Financial transparency is the #1 member demand. A dedicated presentation builds trust and reduces suspicion.
financial.rationale2: Members who understand the cooperative's finances are more likely to increase savings and take productive loans.
financial.check_d7: D-7: Compile financial data from accounting module
financial.check_d3: D-3: Prepare slide deck and print summary reports
financial.check_d1: D-1: Rehearse presentation, confirm AV equipment
financial.roi1: Trust and transparency — reduces member complaints about financial management

environment.label: Environment Day
environment.name: Hari Peduli Lingkungan Koperasi
environment.agenda1: 1. Tree planting, river cleanup, and recycling drive
environment.prep_d5: D-5: Source saplings and coordinate with village environmental office
environment.prep_d1: D-1: Prepare tools, gloves, trash bags, and refreshments
environment.rationale1: Environmental activities position the cooperative as a responsible community leader, not just a business.
environment.check_d5: D-5: Source saplings and coordinate with village environmental office
environment.check_d1: D-1: Prepare tools, gloves, trash bags, and refreshments
environment.roi2: Potential government environmental program partnership and funding

sports.label: Sports Tournament (Futsal / Badminton / Volleyball)
sports.name: Turnamen Olahraga — Koperasi Desa
sports.agenda2: 2. Tournament brackets, finals, and prize ceremony
sports.rationale1: Village youth have energy and no structured outlets. A tournament channels competitive spirit into cooperative engagement.
sports.rationale2: Teams register by showing cooperative membership cards — drives membership verification and renewals.
sports.rationale3: Prizes are vouchers redeemable ONLY at the cooperative store — guaranteed foot traffic and sales spike on redemption day.
sports.check_d21: D-21: Secure field/court, get village head permit, announce tournament
sports.check_d14: D-14: Open team registration at koperasi counter
sports.check_d7: D-7: Print bracket, confirm referees, buy medals
sports.check_d3: D-3: Purchase prize vouchers from koperasi inventory
sports.check_d1: D-1: Set up canopy, sound system, koperasi promo booth
sports.roi1: Voucher prizes = guaranteed revenue return to koperasi store
sports.roi2: Spectator crowd = waserda impulse purchases on event day (+20-40% daily sales)
sports.roi3: Youth engagement = future member pipeline (60% of tournament participants are non-members)
sports.prep_d21: D-21: Secure field/court and obtain village head permit
sports.prep_d14: D-14: Open registration at koperasi counter
sports.prep_d7: D-7: Print tournament bracket, confirm referees
sports.prep_d3: D-3: Purchase prize vouchers from koperasi inventory
sports.prep_d1: D-1: Set up canopy, sound system, and koperasi promo booth

healthwalk.label: Community Health Walk & Morning Exercise
healthwalk.name: Jalan Sehat & Senam Pagi — Koperasi Desa
healthwalk.agenda1: 1. Morning group exercise, 3-5km walk, and door prize draw at koperasi
healthwalk.rationale1: Family-friendly, zero-skill-barrier event. Reaches elderly members and housewives — demographics that rarely attend formal meetings but control household spending.
healthwalk.rationale2: Door prizes (voucher belanja, household items) ensure stay-until-the-end attendance. Koperasi brand is visible for 2+ hours to 200-600 people.
healthwalk.check_d7: D-7: Plan walk route, get police/RT permit
healthwalk.check_d5: D-5: Book instructor, rent sound system
healthwalk.check_d2: D-2: Purchase door prizes from koperasi inventory
healthwalk.check_d1: D-1: Mark route with koperasi banners, prep water stations
healthwalk.roi1: 200-600 people see cooperative branding for 2+ hours — mass impression event
healthwalk.roi2: Door prize distribution = member data collection opportunity (phone numbers, addresses)
healthwalk.roi3: Healthy lifestyle positioning = positive PR for cooperative image in the village
healthwalk.prep_d7: D-7: Plan 3-5 km walk route and obtain permits
healthwalk.prep_d5: D-5: Book aerobics instructor and rent sound system
healthwalk.prep_d3: D-3: Print raffle tickets and purchase door prizes
healthwalk.prep_d2: D-2: Mark route with koperasi banners
healthwalk.prep_d1: D-1: Prepare water stations, finalize MC script and prize list

discountmarket.label: Discount Market Day / Bazar Sembako
discountmarket.name: Pasar Murah & Bazar Sembako — Koperasi Desa
discountmarket.agenda2: 2. General public access with full-price items
discountmarket.rationale1: Direct economic impact. Sell cooperative inventory at 5-15% discount (below market, above cost). Members feel tangible benefit immediately.
discountmarket.rationale2: Non-members pay full price — instant membership incentive. Best timed before Ramadan, school season, or harvest season.
discountmarket.rationale3: Clears slow-moving inventory while generating revenue and foot traffic simultaneously.
discountmarket.check_d10: D-10: Analyze inventory for discount stock selection
discountmarket.check_d7: D-7: Set price list (cost + margin, below market price)
discountmarket.check_d5: D-5: Prepare POS terminals, barcode printed items
discountmarket.check_d3: D-3: Print promotional banners with price highlights
discountmarket.check_d2: D-2: Arrange stall layout, queue management plan
discountmarket.check_d1: D-1: Final stock take, price checks, staff briefing
discountmarket.roi1: Inventory turnover — clears slow-moving stock (target: 30% of selected inventory sold)
discountmarket.roi2: Direct event-day revenue spike with low marketing cost
discountmarket.roi3: 15-30% new member signups from non-members wanting discount access
discountmarket.roi4: Member satisfaction metric improvement (measurable via post-event survey)
discountmarket.prep_d10: D-10: Analyze inventory and select items for discount
discountmarket.prep_d7: D-7: Set price list (cost + margin, below market)
discountmarket.prep_d5: D-5: Prepare POS terminals and barcode items
discountmarket.prep_d3: D-3: Print promotional banners with price highlights
discountmarket.prep_d2: D-2: Arrange stall layout and queue management plan
discountmarket.prep_d1: D-1: Final stock check, price verification, staff briefing

gotongroyong.label: Community Clean-Up Day / Gotong Royong
gotongroyong.name: Gotong Royong & Kerja Bakti — Koperasi Desa
gotongroyong.agenda1: 1. Briefing, group work, group photo, and shared meal
gotongroyong.rationale1: Lowest cost, highest social impact. Fix a visible village problem (clogged drain, broken road, overgrown public space).
gotongroyong.rationale2: Cooperative provides tools, refreshments, and t-shirts. Photographs become social proof for cooperative's community commitment.
gotongroyong.check_d5: D-5: Identify project site, coordinate with RT/RW
gotongroyong.check_d3: D-3: Purchase tools (brooms, trash bags, gloves)
gotongroyong.check_d2: D-2: Print cooperative t-shirts for volunteers
gotongroyong.roi1: Near-zero cost (Rp 300K-1M), massive community goodwill return
gotongroyong.roi2: Photo content for cooperative social media and village noticeboard
gotongroyong.roi3: Village government sees koperasi as development partner (eligible for CSR programs)
gotongroyong.prep_d5: D-5: Identify project site and coordinate with RT/RW
gotongroyong.prep_d1: D-1: Prepare refreshments and final coordination

studytour.label: Cooperative Study Tour / Wisata Koperasi
studytour.name: Wisata Koperasi & Studi Banding — Koperasi Desa
studytour.agenda1: 1. Visit successful koperasi (KUD/KSU/KSP) in another regency
studytour.agenda2: 2. Q&A session, documentation, and post-tour reflection meeting
studytour.rationale1: Visit a big successful koperasi in another regency. Members see what's possible — inspiration drives ambition.
studytour.rationale2: Elite perk for loyal members (minimum 2-year membership, active savings, no overdue loans). Creates aspiration.
studytour.rationale3: Post-tour members return demanding more services, more investments, more growth — drives cooperative innovation.
studytour.check_d14: D-14: Research destination koperasi, send formal visit letter
studytour.check_d10: D-10: Select participants (criteria: active member 2+ years)
studytour.check_d7: D-7: Book bus, prepare itinerary and permission letters
studytour.check_d3: D-3: Brief participants, distribute schedule and materials
studytour.check_d1: D-1: Final check — bus, driver, meals, emergency kit
studytour.roi1: Elite loyalty reward for high-value cooperative members
studytour.roi2: Knowledge transfer from successful cooperatives (new business unit ideas)
studytour.roi3: Members become advocates and innovation drivers within the cooperative
studytour.prep_d14: D-14: Research destination and send formal visit letter
studytour.prep_d10: D-10: Select participants based on membership criteria
studytour.prep_d7: D-7: Book transportation and prepare itinerary
studytour.prep_d3: D-3: Brief participants and distribute schedule
studytour.prep_d1: D-1: Final logistics check — transport, meals, emergency kit

festival.label: Cultural Festival & Competitions
festival.name: Pentas Seni & Lomba — Koperasi Desa
festival.agenda1: 1. Traditional games (balap karung, tarik tambang, panjat pinang)
festival.agenda2: 2. Talent show (karaoke, fashion show, cooking contest)
festival.agenda3: 3. Prize ceremony and cooperative membership drive
festival.rationale1: Indonesia's calendar is packed with celebration moments — 17 Agustus, Hari Koperasi, Hari Kartini. Piggyback on cultural momentum.
festival.rationale2: Cooperative branding everywhere — stage backdrop, prize envelopes, MC script. This is where koperasi becomes the village's cultural center.
festival.rationale3: Traditional games + modern competitions = multigenerational appeal. 300-1000 attendees = massive brand exposure.
festival.check_d14: D-14: Form panitia, choose date aligned with national/cultural holiday
festival.check_d10: D-10: Open competition registration at koperasi counter
festival.check_d7: D-7: Rent stage + sound system, book MC, confirm judges
festival.check_d5: D-5: Print banners, backdrop, raffle tickets, prize envelopes
festival.check_d3: D-3: Purchase prizes from koperasi inventory
festival.check_d2: D-2: Finalize rundown, print programs, security plan
festival.check_d1: D-1: Stage setup, sound check, decoration, member registration booth
festival.roi1: 300-1000 attendees × cooperative brand impressions = village-wide awareness
festival.roi2: New member registrations via dedicated booth at event entrance
festival.roi3: Waserda operates extended hours during event — captures crowd spending
festival.roi4: Local media coverage potential (newspaper, village social media channels)
festival.prep_d14: D-14: Form steering committee and select date
festival.prep_d10: D-10: Open registration at koperasi counter
festival.prep_d7: D-7: Rent stage, book MC, confirm judges
festival.prep_d5: D-5: Print banners and promotional materials
festival.prep_d3: D-3: Purchase prizes from koperasi inventory
festival.prep_d2: D-2: Finalize event rundown and security plan
festival.prep_d1: D-1: Stage setup, sound check, final decoration

healthservice.label: Health Service Day / Pelayanan Kesehatan
healthservice.name: Pelayanan Kesehatan & Sosialisasi — Koperasi Desa
healthservice.agenda1: 1. Free health checks, blood donation, BPJS registration, and cooperative promo
healthservice.rationale1: Partner with Puskesmas/Posyandu for free health checks. Cooperative provides venue, refreshments, and logistics.
healthservice.rationale2: Health is a universal concern — reaches demographics that never attend business meetings.
healthservice.rationale3: Low-cost, high-goodwill event that positions koperasi as a health-conscious community partner.
healthservice.check_d10: D-10: Contact Puskesmas, confirm medical team availability
healthservice.check_d7: D-7: Prepare venue (koperasi hall or village hall)
healthservice.check_d5: D-5: Print health brochures + cooperative promo flyers
healthservice.check_d3: D-3: Arrange queue system, chairs, privacy screens
healthservice.check_d1: D-1: Final coordination with medical team, venue setup
healthservice.roi1: Partnership with government health agency (PR value for cooperative)
healthservice.roi2: Elderly and health-concerned demographics engaged (new member prospects)
healthservice.roi3: Low cost (Rp 500K-2M), maximum goodwill, government alignment
healthservice.prep_d10: D-10: Contact Puskesmas and confirm medical team
healthservice.prep_d5: D-5: Print health brochures and cooperative flyers
healthservice.prep_d3: D-3: Arrange queue system and venue layout
healthservice.prep_d1: D-1: Final coordination and venue setup

storeLayout.title: Store Layout & Floor Plan
storeLayout.empty: No store layouts yet. Create one to start designing your cooperative store floor plan.

development.title: Business Potential Mapping
development.description: Scan new business opportunities by matching them against the village's maximum capacity — commodities, demography, and local demand.

step1.title: 1. Village Profile & Capacity
step1.desc: Collects village profile, member demography, and the maximum capacity ceiling from the local database.

step2.title: 2. Commodity & Opportunity Map
step2.desc: Aggregates demand trends, commodity rates, and market gaps at the county/provincial level.

step3.title: 3. Fit Screening
step3.desc: Scores each opportunity's fit against village capacity — not the financial feasibility figures.

step4.title: 4. Recommendation & Next Steps
step4.desc: Surfaces the top opportunity, then hands off to Financial Feasibility for NPV/IRR validation.

preview.title: Opportunity Preview (Upcoming Feature)
preview.unitName: Fertilizer & Seed Supply Unit (Unit Toko Pupuk & Benih)
preview.reason: Based on 34% rise in member farming transactions and regional shortage of certified distributors in your village.
preview.alert: This screen will display live recommendations once the Federated Sync Network goes live in Phase 2.

simulation.ctaDesc: Trigger a simulated diagnostic run to see how the system scans local and regional data to surface the best business opportunities.

states.1: Aggregating village profile, member demography & maximum capacity...
states.2: Mapping commodities, market gaps & village needs...
states.3: Scoring opportunity fit against village capacity...
states.4: Compiling opportunity recommendations & handing off to feasibility...

impact.auditDesc: Run standard audit models to quantify non-financial social value created.
